description:
Okay so this cheater going under the name I_AM_HOE3 (f5hie found by adding him) claimed he was smurfing from the start as his stats were sus and he was called out. He claims he is a top 500 champ. Now I initially believed it, but I realized his movement was NOT anywhere near champ. After watching the replay there are apparent moments where he is trying to shoot my teammates through walls he cannot shoot through. I was also talking to him and he admitting to using a recoil macro because he is "in the military with limited mouse space" which is just another addon to his walls. I can give a brief description of what he does "sus" in each round. It is a full game, I gave every clip I could to ensure his ban.  I initially believed him as I wont most of my 1s with him but after watching replay he is definitely using walls. 

Round 1: Does not drone, spends a lot of the time AFK. Runs through service into kitchen and throws a drone right on my teammate blue. Teammate adjusts and he knows exactly where he is. Sorry for full length but I am making sure you can understand his movement. 

Round 2: So much afk he should've been kicked, assuming he had a macro or something. Knows castle is coming up on Hibana despite Hibana clearly being oblivious so how could he know? Even looks at him through the wall a bit. Knows hes safe 90 and pushes teammate. Then KNOWS someone is on 90. Recoil goes up but bullets stay straight. 

Round 3: Knows where everyone is, shooting stuff he cant even see. Looks at doc through wall at the end. 

Round 4: Super blatant looking at kali through wall and even shooting. 

Round 6: Tries shooting teammate on rappel through floor/wall. 

Round 7: He was just afk most of the round and dies to a fuze. What top 500 champ is running into the fuze?

Whole team reported him, he was obvious.

latest_comment.message: This user is already banned for ubisoft.
